mapper.sql:
FROM TWORK_MST_ROBSORTER ROB INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CT CT ON CT.CTKEY = ROB.CTKEY
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}
mapper.select:
/* wms-master-robsortermgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectRobsorterMgmtList */
SELECT '0' AS CHK , ROB.CTKEY , CT.CTNM , ROB.ROBSORTERBOXNM , ROB.WIDTH , ROB.DEPTH , ROB.HEIGHT , ROB.CBMSTARTRNG , ROB.CBMCLOSRNG , ROB.USEYN , ROB.INSERTDATE , ROB.INSERTURKEY , ROB.UPDATEDATE , ROB.UPDATEURKEY
mapper.insert: /* wms-master-robsortermgmt-sql-oracle.xml - insertRobsorterMgmt */ INSERT INTO TWORK_MST_ROBSORTER ( CTKEY , ROBSORTERBOXNM , WIDTH , DEPTH , HEIGHT , CBMSTARTRNG , CBMCLOSRNG , USEYN , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) VALUES ( #{ctkey} , #{robsorterboxnm} , COALESCE(#{width}, 0) , COALESCE(#{depth}, 0) , COALESCE(#{height}, 0) , COALESCE(#{cbmstartrng}, 0) , COALESCE(#{cbmclosrng}, 0) , #{useyn} , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') , #{surkey} , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') , #{surkey} )
